name: hidream-o1
notes_low: Installs HiDream_O1-ComfyUI nodes and bundled example workflow only. Download FP8 weights (~10-11 GB) via ComfyUI Manager or Hugging Face after startup. Requires transformers>=4.57.1 (installed at startup).
notes_high: Installs HiDream_O1-ComfyUI nodes and bundled example workflow only. Download BF16 weights (~18-20 GB) via ComfyUI Manager or Hugging Face after startup. Targets 24GB+ VRAM.
description: HiDream O1 Image - local text/reference generation with optional LoRA training nodes.
